jobs.title: SAP FPSL Lead
jobs.description:
"The FPSL Delivery Lead supports the delivery of the Financial Products Subledger (FPSL) capability within the ampliFi program, with accountability for ensuring that finance, accounting, and ledger outcomes are delivered in line with UBS accounting principles, control standards, and delivery governance. The role is responsible for driving disciplined execution across functional design, business validation, testing readiness, and production transition for FPSL scope, while balancing delivery pace with quality, risk management, and stakeholder alignment. The role partners closely with Finance, Data, Integration, and Technology stakeholders to ensure high‑quality, on‑time outcomes and acts as a trusted functional representative for Finance within the FPSL delivery.

Key Responsibilities
- Support end‑to‑end functional delivery for assigned FPSL workstreams or modules within the ampliFi ledger landscape, with clear ownership of outcomes.
- Contribute to and review functional designs and configurations to ensure correct accounting treatment, posting logic, balances, and alignment with UBS ledger principles.
- Develop and maintain delivery plans covering functional scope, milestones, dependencies, and impacts to Finance, ensuring transparency and realistic commitments.
- Proactively manage risks, issues, and dependencies (RAID), with particular focus on financial accuracy, regulatory expectations, and operational readiness, escalating where required.
- Coordinate day‑to‑day delivery activities across Finance, Data, Integration, Testing, and Deployment teams, promoting collaboration and accountability across organisational boundaries.
- Ensure adherence to agreed delivery standards, accounting principles, design decisions, and change control processes.
- Support SIT and UAT execution from a functional perspective, including validation of business scenarios, assessment of defects based on finance impact, and support for business sign‑off.
- Assist with production readiness and cutover preparation, focusing on financial continuity, accuracy of balances, and stability of controls, and supporting smooth transition to business‑as‑usual operations.
"

jobs.title: Reporting and Automation Analyst
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about data? Are you looking to drive key product and regulatory initiatives across banking products such as SBL, Mortgages, Cards and Deposits? We are looking for someone like that who will analyze product, Financial Advisor and client data, support product development, drive/support revenue-generating initiatives and work very closely with product management, control and support partners.
Key competencies and responsibilities include:

• Develop data-driven business insights and analytics to drive growth within Banking
• Key contributor to strategic initiatives and part of a team that works on business growth development initiatives
• Deliver insights and segmentation by leveraging various internal and external data to grow market share of banking products and services and support strategic banking decision making
• Use product/financial SME to demonstrate through reporting and analyses how the product area drives profitability and work to develop strategies to enhance revenues
• Develop and assist in various reporting initiatives and data analytics on banking initiatives
• Take an ownership role in product data capabilities and work within the team and with partners to ensure sound data governance and development frameworks
• Analyze complex business problems and issues using data from internal and external sources to provide insight to decision-makers
• Identify and interpret trends and patterns in datasets to construct recommendations for strategic/tactical sales plans

jobs.title: Securities Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you detail oriented, even when multitasking? Do you know how to work with a team to achieve a common goal?

We’re looking for someone like that to help us:
- Collaborate with external clients and internal clients to improve processes, drive outcomes and build lasting relationships
– Process transactions, confirmations and manage exceptions and risk
– Perform root cause analysis to identify and drive process improvements
– Deliver timely and complete resolutions to the client
– Assist with new client set up and ensure the first trades are processed correctly
– Proactively manage the Client experience, anticipate needs and provide excellent client service
– Collaborate across Operations team to identify process efficiencies and solutions

Detailed salary information :
• Nashville: the salary range for this role is $50000 to $65000
The expected salary range(s) for this role as of the date of this posting is/are based on factors including, but not limited to, experience, qualifications, education, location and skill level. This role may also be eligible for discretionary incentive compensation. For benefits information, please visit ubs.com/usbenefits .

jobs.description:
re you a strong analytical and inventive thinker? Do you enjoy developing pitch ideas for stakeholders, clients, and investors?  
 
We’re looking for an Investment Banking Associate to: 
 
• develop pitch book presentations to explain industry trends, discuss client options, and recommend strategies to meet client goals 
• generate new ideas and creative approaches that push the business forward 
• identify and meet client needs, coordinating, and working alongside colleagues and investors 
• create and analyze financial models for potential transactions and client pitches
• spot problems, generate options, and recommend solutions (you’re a contingency planner by nature)
• lead execution and project management of the potential transactions - coordinate teams of bankers, legal counsels, tax advisors, run due diligence processes and actively participate in the negotiations of legal documentation

jobs.title: Cards Core Processing Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you incredibly organized with an eye for detail? Do you know how to take care of business?

As a key member of the Cards Processing Team, you will be responsible for ensuring the accurate and timely settlement of daily processes to move funds between UBS and our card vendors. You’ll work cross-functionally to support operations by:

• Proven leadership experience, including coaching/mentoring peers, leading workstreams, and driving accountability for timelines and outcomes.
• Managing resolution of errors and rejections on card applications and communicating solutions and outcomes to branch staff.
• Validating card benefit and promotional requests for eligibility and processing redemptions.
• Manage with urgency the end-to-end card issuance process, including card production, personalization, and distribution.
• Reconciliation of multiple general ledgers used for card processing, researching and resolving outages.
• Accurate performance of card account maintenance requests.
• Coordinate issues to the correct system support, track for timely resolution and communicate to branch staff.
• Payment Research- to include unidentified payments, payment returns and payment reversal requests.
• Communication of errors reported by the bank to the branch staff to move the card applications forward (credit freezes, under 21 applicant requirement, additional paperwork for underwriting)

jobs.title: Client Account Manager Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you a communicative professional with a keen eye for detail and passionate about elevating client experiences? If you thrive in dynamic environments and value building strong relationships, we invite you to join our team as a Client Account Manager

• act as a primary point of contact for clients, responding to their demands with agility and efficiency
• manage all operational and administrative account processes, including the organization and maintenance of client documentation and Know Your Client (KYC)
• coordinate closely with stakeholders to align client requests and ensure the delivery of exceptional service quality
• foster a risk-aware culture with the team by ensuring clients are managed in line with best practices
• demonstrate outstanding problem-solving skills, attention to detail and commitment to client satisfaction

jobs.title: Market Administrative Officer
jobs.description:
We’re looking for a South Florida Market Administrative Officer to:

jobs.title: Audit Expert - Financial Crime Prevention

titleByLocale.it: Esperto di audit - Prevenzione della criminalità finanziaria

jobs.description:
Are you a thoughtful evaluator of risk who enjoys understanding complex business processes and products? Do you want to play a role in how a global organization strengthens its controls and adapts in a fast moving environment?

As an Audit Expert in Group Internal Audit, you will:

• •plan and deliver high quality, risk based audits, applying sound judgement to generate meaningful insights
• •assess the design and effectiveness of internal controls, highlighting strong practices and where risks require management attention
• •use AI and data analytics to enhance audit work and develop data driven testing and insights
• •develop clear, evidence based audit findings and reports, escalating significant concerns appropriately
• •communicate complex topics in a concise and constructive way to stakeholders, helping promote risk awareness
• •collaborate effectively with peers across audit teams and build trusted relationships with stakeholders at all levels
• •coverage may include (for example): financial crime risks (e.g., AML, KYC, sanctions, anti bribery & corruption)

jobs.title: Americas Compliance Audit Manager

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile del controllo di conformità delle Amer

jobs.description:
Are you a sharp evaluator of risk? Can you investigate complex situations and propose solutions? We're looking for someone like that who can:
• lead or conduct reviews and audits of specific business areas, provide practical, innovative and value-added solutions to issues identified
• drive or work as a team member on reviews and audits, including thematic and front-to-back
• analyze and assess risks and barriers to delivery assumed by both the business and support functions
• identify and evaluate the effectiveness of controls designed to address those risks
• prepare reports of audit findings for UBS senior management, monitor the results, risk profile and developments across Financial Crime Prevention and provide input for planning sessions
• successfully collaborate with peers in and across audit teams
• Builds-up and continuously maintains sufficient knowledge of organizational and governance structure, of products and processes, of legal and regulatory requirements, as well as developing professional skills and experience, to allow for an effective and professional mandate execution.

jobs.title: Trade Support Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you ready to make an impact in Asset Management Japan?

We are looking for Trade Support Specialist to:
•Process transactions and release settlement instructions for ITM funds and mandate accounts across multiple asset classes, including equities, fixed income, FX, derivatives, and onshore/offshore funds
• •Ensure the accuracy and completeness of trade data for NAV calculation, performance measurement, client reporting, and coordinate with trust banks and internal teams involved in NAV calculation.
• •Perform daily operational tasks using core accounting systems such as T-Star/TX and FAIMS, and support the setup and launch of ITM funds and mandate accounts
• •Support internal control requirements and audit-related activities and documentation, and adapt to new products and investment structures by applying established operational processes

jobs.title: Spezialist/in Hypotheken und Grundbuchwesen 80 – 100%
jobs.description:
Hast du Erfahrungen in der Hypothekarverarbeitung und dem Schweizerischen Grundbuchwesen?
Ist effizientes, exaktes und verantwortungsbewusstes Arbeiten genau deine Stärke?
Hast du Freude an administrativen Tätigkeiten mit flexiblen Arbeitszeiten?

Dann bewirb dich, denn wir wollen wachsen und suchen Verstärkung!

Deine Aufgaben:
• Selbständige Abwicklung der bewilligten Kreditgesuche
• Erstellen von allen notwendigen Kredit- und Sicherungsdokumenten
• Abbilden und Bewirtschaften von Hypotheken und Sicherheiten (z.B. Grundpfänder, Policen, Bürgschaften)
• Erstellen von Zahlungsversprechen sowie fristgerechter Ausführung von Zahlungen
• Sicherstellung aller Bedingungen für die Freigabe der Hypotheken und Zahlungen
• Begleitung und korrekte Terminierung der Geschäftsfälle in Eigenverantwortung
• Korrespondenz mit Grundbuchämtern, Notaren, Banken und Versicherungsgesellschaften
• Pflichtbewusster Umgang mit potenziellen Risiken

jobs.title: Client Relationship Manager, ETF & Index Fund

titleByLocale.it: Client Relationship Manager, ETF e Fondo indicizzato
titleByLocale.en: Client Relationship Manager, ETF & Index Fund
titleByLocale.de: Client Relationship Manager, ETF & Index Fund
titleByLocale.fr: Client Relationship Manager, ETF & Index Fund

jobs.description:
Do you have a track record of successfully managing client relationships? Are you able to create ‎collaborative solutions in challenging and complex situations?

If so, we are looking for a Client Coverage person for UBS ETF & Index Fund in Singapore:

• cover the strategic development and management of the ETF & Index Fund business Singapore and SEA region. Positioned within one of the key growth areas of the company, you will play a critical role in driving the growth and success of their ETF offerings, overseeing all relevant aspects of product development, distribution, marketing, and operations. This position requires a combination of strategic vision, market insight, collaborative mindset, strong leadership abilities and out-of-the-box thinking to position the UBS ETF & Index Fund business for long-term success in a competitive landscape.
• involved in development and execution of a comprehensive strategy for the UBS ETF & Index Fund business for Singapore, aligned with the overall goals and objectives of the firm.
• expand distribution channels and increase market penetration for UBS ETFs & Index Funds in Singapore through effective marketing initiatives, digital engagement, partnerships, and client interaction to increase sales growth, generate revenues and UBS’s position in the market.
• build and maintain strong relationships with wealth management, institutional and wholesale clients, financial advisors, and other key stakeholders to understand their needs and preferences, and to effectively position UBS ETFs & Index Funds.
• collaborate with internal colleagues regionally and globally including portfolio management, capital markets, marketing and product development and support the efforts of the generalist wholesale and institutional client coverage teams. identify opportunities for new UBS ETFs & Index Funds and develop enhancements to existing offerings, working closely with the investment, research, and product development teams.
• ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements related to UBS ETFs & Index Funds, staying abreast of industry developments and implementing necessary changes to maintain compliance.
• monitor and analyse the investment performance and sales results of UBS ETF & Index Fund products, tracking key metrics and performance drivers to inform decision-making and drive continuous improvement. Represent the firm in industry forums, conferences, and other events to enhance UBS’s visibility and reputation within the indexing marketplace.

jobs.title: Risk Expert, IB Derivatives & Solutions

titleByLocale.it: Risk Expert, derivati e soluzioni IB

jobs.description:
Are you a sharp evaluator of risk, who enjoys investigating complex business processes and products? Do you want to play a key role in improving the effectiveness of business critical processes to help safeguard and strengthen UBS?

We’re looking for a Risk Expert or Auditor to:

• plan, execute and lead audits, issue assurance, and risk assessment reviews according to our internal standards that are fully supported by the work done.
• highlight where controls are functioning well or where UBS needs to act to better manage current and emerging risks, and escalate any significant concerns or issues appropriately.
• meet our internal standards for the quality, execution and documentation of assurance work, taking account of legal entity coverage expectations, where required.
• proactively and successfully collaborate with peers in and across audit teams.
• build and maintain constructive relationships with colleagues and relevant stakeholders at all levels including senior management.
• continuously assess the risk profile of the relevant UBS IB businesses.
• participate in regulatory inspections and address inquiries from regulators

jobs.title: Product Manager for Investment Funds with German

titleByLocale.it: Product Manager per fondi di investimento con sede in Germania
titleByLocale.en: Product Manager for Investment Funds with German
titleByLocale.de: Product Manager for Investment Funds with German
titleByLocale.fr: Product Manager for Investment Funds with German

jobs.description:
Do you have a sound knowledge of investment funds? Do you have experience in managing projects and like to engage with various tasks and people at the same time? Do you want to help us to manage our growing business within UBS Asset Management?

We’re looking for a Product Manager to:

• Coordinate client projects independently front-to-back, such as investment fund lifecycle events (e.g. new share classes, new sub-portfolio, change of asset manager) with all stakeholders and the client. This includes project planning, communication and execution
• Support complex projects, such as the set-up of a new fund or mandate, their repositioning, merger or liquidation. Coordinate and manage a project stream or defined tasks such as operational implementation, depending on the project
• Act as point of contact for day-to-day inquiries related to third party investment funds and mandates from clients and client managers, providing high quality responses and solutions, both efficiently and effectively
• Manage recurring tasks with subject matter experts and stakeholders, such as reporting, distributions, budgeting
• Data management and maintenance required to manage our fund shelf
• Assume responsibility for timely completeness of processes and documentation, consistency and accuracy of data

titleByLocale.en: Business Strategist, UBS Chief Strategy Office - GWM
titleByLocale.de: Business Strategist, UBS Chief Strategy Office - GWM
titleByLocale.fr: Business Strategist, UBS Chief Strategy Office - GWM

jobs.description:
Your role
Do you have a strategic mindset to engage with senior stakeholders? Do you have strong problem solving skills and do you enjoy bringing structure to complex situations, engage with a variety of views and stakeholders to find common solutions? Are you good at communicating complex business challenges in a constructive and easy way?

We are looking for someone who wants to:
• drive the development of the GWM strategy on a global, country, channel and product level, together with the respective businesses
• support the decision making of our internal business partners on senior management level
• conduct industry, competitor and benchmarking analyses
• design operating models and processes for specific markets and business segments
• coordinate and challenge business plans including financial modelling
• develop implementation roadmaps of strategic initiatives
• drive M&A projects from a strategic perspective (rationale, financial opportunity, due diligence, etc.)
• be open to do cross-divisional strategy projects/rotations as opportunities arise

jobs.title: CA Intern
jobs.description:
Interested in working in finance, and specifically want to help produce daily and monthly P&L statements as well as balance sheets, but not sure where to start? Do you want to work for a firm with a truly global footprint that consistently ranks among the world's top financial institutions? We're looking for ambitious students to join our 2025 12-month internship program within Group Finance.
You’ll get to: 
• have a better understanding of P&L and balance sheet
• compile and analyze financial information, help close books at month-end, clear breaks, post journals and learn how to explain significant P&L changes
• build relationships with internal and external clients
• understand our industry, culture and strategy

jobs.title: Premises Assistant Manager
jobs.description:
The Premises Assistant Manager supports the effective delivery of day‑to‑day facilities operations by working closely with third‑party service providers to ensure a safe, efficient, compliant and engaging workplace. The role has a strong operational focus across staff restaurants, transportation services, hospitality, soft services, and general facilities management, while ensuring high service standards, cost control, and a positive employee experience.

Key 
• Responsibilities
Facilities Operations & Service Delivery

Support the day‑to‑day management of facilities operations, ensuring seamless delivery of services across the premises, including staff restaurants, transportation, housekeeping, mailroom, security coordination, and other workplace services

Act as the operational interface with third‑party suppliers, ensuring service delivery aligns with agreed contracts, KPIs, and UBS standards.

Monitor supplier performance, conduct regular service reviews, and proactively address service gaps or operational risks

Vendor & Contract Management

Support contract administration and governance for facilities-related vendors, including catering and transport partners.

Track KPIs, SLAs, and compliance requirements, escalating issues where service delivery or safety standards are at risk.

Assist with cost monitoring, invoice validation, and identification of efficiency or optimization opportunities

Workplace Experience & Employee Engagement

Ensure staff restaurants and transport services deliver a consistently positive employee experience, balancing quality, safety, and cost efficiency.

Support workplace initiatives aimed at improving employee satisfaction, engagement, and well‑being.

Health, Safety & Compliance

Support compliance with local statutory requirements, building safety norms, fire safety, and internal UBS policies.

Promote a strong safety culture across all facilities services and suppliers, ensuring risks are identified and mitigated proactively

jobs.title: Senior Client Reporting Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you interested in working at Fund Reporting Team in the Asset Management?

We are looking for a Senior Fund Reporting Specialist to:
• Produce, review, and distribute factsheets, market commentaries, and various reports (monthly, quarterly, annual, statutory) for Japan- and foreign-domiciled funds, ensuring accuracy and timely delivery
• Take a hands-on role in daily reporting production while applying sound professional judgment and maintaining high quality and control standards in a regulated environment
• Coordinate reporting timelines and deliverables across internal stakeholders, including Sales, Product, and Investment teams
• Contribute to process improvements that enhance reporting efficiency and reduce operational risk

titleByLocale.it: Junior Initiative Manager nell'Investment Bank Change Team

titleByLocale.de: Junior Initiative Manager in the Investment Bank Change Team
titleByLocale.fr: Junior Initiative Manager in the Investment Bank Change Team

jobs.description:
Are you a project manager looking for your next big challenge? Do you know what it takes to deliver complex changes in an Agile operating environment? Are you comfortable presenting to and influencing senior management stakeholders?

We're looking for an Initiative Manager to:
• manage the delivery of one (or more) new change initiative as part of larger IB-wide strategic and/or regulatory change programs. Examples of projects we handle include European T+1 Settlement, CRD VI, transaction/trade reporting regulations, and others
• manage the project plan, resources, risks, issues, delivery schedule, and quality
• steer a multidisciplinary team through the full project lifecycle
• develop strong relationships with all project stakeholders
• provide regular updates to senior management
• ensure that Run-the-Bank teams are kept informed, involved, and able to take on their new responsibilities after go-live

jobs.title: Internship in Corporate Action Team
jobs.description:
Do you have a sharp eye for detail?
Are you known for hitting deadlines?
We’re looking for someone like that to help us in:
• assisting in monitoring and processing corporate actions (e.g., mergers, dividends, spin-offs, etc.),
• supporting the analysis and classification of events received from data vendors, custodians, and other sources,
• helping ensure timely and accurate notification of events to internal stakeholders and clients,
• participating in process documentation, exception handling, and control checks,
• collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure data integrity and service quality.

jobs.title: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analyst

titleByLocale.it: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analista
titleByLocale.en: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analyst
titleByLocale.de: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analyst
titleByLocale.fr: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analyste

jobs.description:
We are looking for a Market risk quant in the Market risk model validation team in India to perform:
• Independent validation of market risk models in line with the UBS model governance policy and regulatory requirements. Key responsibilities include
• Assess the model's conceptual soundness and methodology
• Check the appropriateness/quality of input data used for model development, review appropriateness of model parameters, accuracy of the model calibration etc.
• Review model outcome, impacts, or develop alternate benchmark approaches to challenge model outputs (as appropriate)
• Assess model risk, providing effective challenge to model assumptions and evaluate model limitations
• Write comprehensive validation reports, documenting the assessments to required standards
• Collaborate effectively with stakeholders globally to understand / challenge potential model risks; communicate validation findings to relevant stakeholders
• Support ongoing review of model performance and model change reviews to ensure models remain fit for purpose

Are you incredibly organized with an eye for detail? Do you have a high client service orientation and high risk awareness? We're looking for someone like that to:
- Being part of the IB KYC Reviews team built out in UBS Shanghai BSC - supporting the APAC Investment Banking business.

- You would be identified as one of the Member within the team whom would be handling periodic review cases on a day-to-day basis. You would be developed to become an SME in KYC, Performing name & media screening and to handle client outreach requests obtaining relevant KYC documents.

jobs.title: Client Account Manager
jobs.description:
Do you want to proactively go the extra mile with us to help clients? Are you focused on the details, even when under pressure?

We’re looking for a Client Account Manager (CAM) to:
• support our private bankers known as Client Advisors in our Southeast Asia desks in Singapore to deliver exceptional client service and experience (our assistant private bankers are called CAMs)
• be point-of-entry contact for clients with account queries or orders, stock orders, payments, etc.
• assist with account opening, onboarding, due diligence and monitoring activities
• support with documentation for client meetings, investment proposals and the like
• collaborate with colleagues to ensure that all client accounts comply with legal, compliance and regulatory requirements

Are you a leader in innovation? Do you know how to come up with creative ideas for clients?

We’re looking for an investment banker to:

• create partnerships by increasing depth and breadth of existing client relationships
• increase the returns of products and services
• generate new ideas and creative approaches that push the business forward
• assist in planning overall resource requirements, by recruiting, developing and retaining talented individuals
• make sound and balanced judgments (and always within professional, ethical, regulatory and legal standards)
• motivate and inspire others by providing a vision of shared goals

• New York: the salary range for this role is $275000 to $275000

jobs.title: Mutual Fund Product Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about driving client success through strategic mutual fund solutions? Ready to lead collaborative efforts across internal and external stakeholders to optimize service and product delivery? Are you driven by a deep interest in investment product management, eager to shape and innovate our offering to meet evolving market demands?

We’re looking for someone like that who can help us:

• Lead and direct the domestic and offshore mutual fund and money market fund business as the primary subject matter expert, providing strategic guidance to the Advisory Sales Desk, advisory program teams, Service Group, CIO, Advanced Planning, and other internal stakeholders.
• Drive the resolution of complex trading and operational challenges
• Foster strong relationships with internal partners, fund companies, and the field.
• Strategically manage relationships with over 450 mutual fund providers, partnering with Legal to manage the contract lifecycle, including creation, negotiation and execution of distribution agreement
• Develop and maintain marketing, disclosure, training, and educational materials, including managing internal and public website content.
• Identify opportunities to increase product awareness among Financial Advisors and clients and explore new product offerings with fund partners to support business growth and CIO alignment.
• Manage a suite of projects to enhance operational efficiency, improve the FA and client experience, and unlock revenue and cost saving opportunities.
• Forge and cultivate key partnerships across the firm to develop deep expertise in platforms and product offerings, encompassing both traditional and non-traditional assets.
• Monitor and analyze legislative, regulatory, and industry developments and lead the implementation of enhancements in collaboration with the Public Policy Office and internal control partners.

jobs.description:
Are you a technology enthusiast seeking stimulating challenges in an innovative environment? Do you thrive on developing robust systems and exploring new market technologies? If so, we have the perfect opportunity for you!

We are looking for a Fullstack Developer (Java + React) to:

• develop and provide maintenance of applications using Java technologies, such as Spring including (Spring Boot, Spring Data, and Spring Security), Java EE, Design Patterns; and Web Technologies, such as Angular and React
• collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to understand and translate business requirements into innovative technical solutions
• lead technical design and implementations of robust and scalable systems using sophisticated market technologies
• define code standards to ensure quality
• identify and solve complex technical issues effectively and efficiently, always seeking opportunities for continuous improvement
• partner with other IT teams to enable and drive new solutions and architectures

jobs.title: Kundenberaterin / Kundenberater Affluent, 80 - 100% Brig
jobs.description:
Sind Sie eine initiative, kontaktfreudige Persönlichkeit? Und laufen Sie zur Hochform auf, wenn Sie Kundinnen und Kunden mit Hilfe der neusten Technologien beraten?

Dann nehmen Sie doch mit uns Kontakt auf. Wir suchen eine Kollegin oder einen Kollegen, die/der ein Flair für die Anliegen der Kunden hat und sich in der digitalen Welt wohl fühlt.

Und das sind Ihre Kernaufgaben:
• Sie betreuen und bearbeiten nach einer umfassenden Einarbeitungszeit ein eigenes Kundenportefeuille mit Anlage- und Hypothekarkunden.
• Sie erfassen die vielseitigen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden und Kundinnen präzis und beraten sie kompetent.
• Sie haben ein ausgeprägtes Gespür für optimale Lösungen. Damit sichern Sie Kundenbeziehungen langfristig und punkten bei Neukunden und Neukundinnen.
• Sie gehen aktiv auf Ihre Kunden zu und schaffen eine Kundennähe, welche es Ihnen ermöglicht weiteres Potenzial auszuschöpfen.
• Bei Ihrer Beratung setzen Sie auch auf innovative Tools und Apps. So nehmen Sie die Kundschaft auf unsere Reise in die Zukunft mit: Sie ermuntern sie, unsere digitalen Produkte einzusetzen und unterstützen Sie dabei.

jobs.title: Investment Banking Associate - Americas Technology
jobs.description:
Are you a leader in innovation? Do you know how to come up with creative ideas for clients?

Managers in Investment Banking are responsible for the development and implementation of the business strategy and the relevant business model in the different areas, regions, sectors or segments. They are responsible for the ultimate sign-off and deployment of relevant financial, infrastructure and human resources towards achievement of the plan. They develop and manage relationships at every level and provide advice and/or analyze local market conditions to integrate into decision-making processes.

• •develop financial models, perform valuation analyses, conduct industry research, and evaluate key trends and opportunities
• •create partnerships by increasing depth and breadth of existing client relationships
• •increase the returns of products and services
• •generate new ideas and creative approaches that push the business forward
• •make sound and balanced judgments (and always within professional, ethical, regulatory and legal standards)
• •motivate and inspire others by providing a vision of shared goals
• •represent the organization internally and externally as an executive for their respective area
• •responsible for maintaining internal cross-functional and cross-divisional client relationships.

jobs.title: US Tax Specialist
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Tax Specialist to join our UBS Asset Management Tax Team as an Associate Director.
Specifically, the job holder is expected to:
• Collaborate with all business areas of AM across the US region to manage and resolve tax issues related to AM products, including the development of new products and providing specialized asset management tax advice on structuring and efficiency at the fund, investor, and portfolio levels
• Oversee annual tax compliance processes for various fund types (trading funds, private credit funds, fund of funds, mutual funds), ensuring adherence to all relevant regulations
• Manage and monitor FATCA/CRS, FBAR, 1099, and shareholder reporting for UBS AM Funds
• Serve as the primary contact for investor inquiries regarding tax reporting deliverables, ensuring timely and accurate responses and thorough reviews of investor deliverables (e.g., K-1 forms, estimated tax letters)
• Ensure timely filing of all tax returns and compliance with Group Tax policies and supplements
• Manage tax risk (financial and reputational) across the region, including, but not limited to:
o Regular reviews and reporting of tax risk issues to the US Head of AM Tax
o Implementing procedures and controls to mitigate tax risk
o Monitoring tax and operational risk related to third-party service providers (fund administrators, advisors)
• Provide prompt and comprehensive responses to investor inquiries
• Support portfolio managers by addressing fund-related questions concerning jurisdictional requirements, diversification tests, and withholding tax matters
• Support business initiatives through the TRPA process, including pre- and post-launch conditions and coordination with Group Tax specialists for country-specific and indirect/specialist tax sign-off
• Manage the appointment and oversight of external advisors on tax matters, ensuring compliance with UBS internal contract management requirements
• Review of tax wording in fund documentation and other AM relevant legal agreements
• Build and maintain relationships with senior management and UBS Group stakeholders to establish and communicate tax priorities based on changing regulatory environments
• Engage the business in tax matters, reconciling the competing imperatives of the management of tax risk with commercial and regulatory drivers of the business
• Ensure that the AM business adhere to the Group Tax policies and supplements
• Manage various tax control and governance documents for US AM business including periodic update of the existing documents and creation of new documents where required
• Provide the business with regular updates and training on tax and regulatory developments
• Assist in regulatory projects where a tax expert is required (e.g. FATCA, CRS, CARF, s871m, Financial Transaction Tax)
• Build and maintain relationships with UBS Group functions (e.g. Finance/Legal) and other UBS divisions (Global Wealth Management and Investment Bank) to build the profile of AM Tax, and to ensure the transfer of knowledge for the benefit of the UBS Group

In a time of increasing regulatory and operational challenge, coupled with a growing business globally, we are looking for an experienced tax professional who enjoys working in a dynamic and constantly developing environment. The job holder will be responsible for the proactive management and resolution of tax issues, as well as for the implementation of necessary procedures and controls regarding tax risk management in AM business across the United States region.

titleByLocale.it: Investment Banking Associate - EMEA Global Industrial Group
titleByLocale.en: Investment Banking Associate - EMEA Global Industrial Group
titleByLocale.de: Investment Banking Associate - EMEA Global Industrial Group
titleByLocale.fr: Investment Banking Associate - EMEA Global Industrial Group

jobs.description:
The UBS Global Industrials Group is looking for a dynamic and driven individual to join our team. We’re looking for someone who fits the below description:
• independent thinker, who will find creative and correct solutions to senior clients and alike
• strong analytical skillset, able to define, guide and review detailed valuation (LBO, DCF, comparables, transactions etc.) and other financial analyses in the context of M&A transactions
• proactive and driven, capable of actively participating in identifying new opportunities and new clients, as well as supporting in coverage of existing clients with new ideas
• collaborative, and able to work flexibly and adapt to different working styles within the GIG team and across product and country partner teams
• client focused, and will build and support existing relationships across our sponsor and corporate coverage universe
• team focused, and will help to build team culture and develop skills of junior bankers
• dynamic, with an appetite to work across verticals, including industrial technologies, business services, aerospace & defence, automotive, transportation & logistics, paper & packaging and building materials
• capable of supporting in the execution of transactions across products (M&A, equity capital markets, leveraged finance etc.)

titleByLocale.fr: Internship in Asset Management Risk Control

jobs.description:
Are you someone who thrives on solving complex risk challenges and wants to shape the future of risk management in a dynamic asset management environment?
We are looking to hire someone who can:
• review and analyze portfolios from a risk perspective, identifying market, credit, liquidity, and sustainability risks and control gaps across asset classes
• lead the design and implementation of new risk management processes and reporting frameworks
• calculate and report risk metrics, and contribute to projects driven by regulatory changes in the fund industry
• ensure timely preparation of regular and ad hoc risk analysis and reports for key stakeholders to support decision-making
• foster upstream and downstream stakeholder management

jobs.title: Investment Banking Analyst - EMEA Private Funds Group

titleByLocale.it: Investment Banking Analista - EMEA Private Funds Group
titleByLocale.en: Investment Banking Analyst - EMEA Private Funds Group
titleByLocale.de: Investment Banking Analyst - EMEA Private Funds Group
titleByLocale.fr: Investment Banking Analyste - EMEA Private Funds Group

jobs.description:
You will join the UBS Private Funds Group (PFG) within Global Banking, with a primary focus on primary fundraising advisory. PFG provides global advisory and distribution services to private fund sponsors across private equity, private debt, infrastructure and real assets, combining primary fundraising capabilities with secondary and liquidity solutions.

In this role, you will support the origination and execution of fundraising mandates, working closely with senior PFG bankers, global distribution colleagues and clients. You will play a key role in evaluating opportunities, preparing marketing materials, coordinating investor outreach and supporting successful capital raises. The role also offers exposure to GP‑led and LP‑led secondary transactions.

You will be responsible for a broad range of execution, advisory and project management activities, including:

• working with senior PFG team members to evaluate prospective fundraising opportunities, including detailed analysis of client portfolios, track records, teams, strategies and market opportunities
• advising clients on fundraising strategy, including fund structuring, timing, investor targeting and legal and commercial terms
• articulating complex investment and marketing messages clearly and effectively to institutional investors
• leading the preparation of key fundraising materials, including private placement memoranda, investor presentations, due diligence questionnaires and financial models
• planning, building and managing virtual data rooms to support investor due diligence
• maintaining comprehensive fundraising trackers, coordinating investor outreach, managing feedback and producing regular internal and external reports
• supporting the organisation and execution of investor roadshows, liaising with global distribution colleagues and roadshow coordinators

jobs.title: Integrated Middle Office Specialist
jobs.description:
Ensure Completeness, Accuracy and Timeliness ("CAT") requirements Trade capture controls and Trade Lifecycle controls for our investment banking derivatives trades across credit business. This includes daily exceptions management of intersystem reconciliations at transaction/position/cash level, also the associated reporting activities, and ensuring appropriate escalation of items work with other TLCS (Trade & Lifecycle Controlling Services) stakeholders..

Are you inquisitive with analytical and risk-aware mindset? Do you have a F2B controls background?

We’re looking for a Middle Office Specialist to:

• Be responsible for a suite of controls, facilitating support aimed at mitigating risk and working with other MO functions to resolve escalated issues
• monitor and run the CSAs for SPEs as these are not managed through the bank’s collateral pool
• Run controls on collateral and cash sitting in an SPE – Daily check in respect of any changes made to the collateral held in UBS’s SPVs
• Actively and continually provide ideas and execute on process improvements in the exception management and data quality of submission to clients.
• Be the subject matter expert in all team activities and support teams and peripheral stakeholders.
• Project Management activities – assisting with end-to-end support around IMO initiatives including conducting initial impact analysis, tracking for deliverables and following up with management and IMO staff.
• Take ownership of tracking, updating issue and action logs
• Partner with sales and trading to manage and facilitate new business initiatives
• Participate in strategic change initiatives by acting as subject matter expert

jobs.title: Senior Investment Officer, Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments

titleByLocale.it: Senior Investment Officer, Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments
titleByLocale.en: Senior Investment Officer, Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments
titleByLocale.de: Senior Investment Officer, Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Investment Officer, Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments

jobs.description:
Do you have experience in private secondaries and/or co-investments and want to join a fast growing team deploying capital across GP led, LP led deals and co-investments?

We’re looking for a Senior Investment Officer in the Private Equity Secondaries & Co-Investments team, to:
• source and evaluate private equity secondary and co-investment opportunities (both GP and LP led), building trusted relationships with GPs and advisors
• lead the investment processes from screening through to legal negotiation and closing
• lead due diligence and investment analysis, guiding junior team members, and reviewing business models, financials and operating KPIs
• translate industry insights into comprehensive investment recommendations and risk assessments
• coach and develop colleagues, fostering a collaborative and inclusive team culture
• contribute to portfolio monitoring post close and reporting materials for stakeholders
• support fundraising efforts engaging with clients and partners
• keep up to date on deals and market developments, including transaction terms & pricings

• Develop and price new trade ideas. Conduct customised payoff modeling and risk analysis for Structured Notes and OTC products.
• Optimise and automate the desk’s infrastructure (customised pricers, analysis tools, automated pricing runs and trade processes).
• Work efficiently, collaboratively, and inclusively with colleagues in sales, trading, and other areas of the firm.

jobs.title: Alternative Investment Senior Specialist (US Shift)
jobs.description:
Are you incredibly organized with an eye for detail? Do you know how to take care of business?

We are looking for someone like that who can

Perform daily functions such as

Provide premium quality service to Financial Advisors and clients invested in Alternative Investment products; ensuring deadlines are always met

Your role will include the preparation and review of Net Asset Value files, as well as ensuring all client account values are updated accurately and timely, by agreed deadlines.

This role offers the chance to grow and learn within a dynamic and fast-paced environment.

Establish yourself as a trusted partner for Financial Advisors and our clients.

Evaluate procedures and processes with focus on continued improvement, reduce risks, strengthen controls and increase field and client satisfaction.

Reconciliation of ledgers, events, and trades

Tracking of key events and capturing transactions
